nasb.text: “In those days they will not say again, ‘The fathers have eaten sour grapes, And the children’s teeth are set on edge.’

esv.text: In those days they shall no longer say: “‘The fathers have eaten sour grapes, and the children’s teeth are set on edge.’

cnv.text: “在那些日子，人必不再說： ‘父親吃了酸葡萄， 兒子的牙齒酸倒了。’

ccb.text: 那时，人再不会说， “‘父亲吃酸葡萄， 儿子的牙酸倒了。’
